features: two-way audio possible with an external speaker connected to the audio output
ONVIF Profile G, S, and T conformant
three viewing modes: fisheye, panoramic, and PTZ (fisheye+PTZ or fisheye+panoramic+PTZ fusion layouts)
de-warping can be done on-camera or via a compatible recorder
people/vehicle detection, heat mapping, crowd density analytics

frigate.notes: This fisheye camera supports multiple simultaneous viewing modes (fisheye/panoramic/PTZ) and can de-warp on-camera — check the camera's web UI to determine which mode(s) are exposed as separate RTSP streams before configuring in Frigate, since a raw fisheye stream will need dewarping either on-camera or in Frigate itself for useful object detection. ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed; exact RTSP URL path not found in sources reviewed.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed by the manufacturer.

blue_iris.notes: Strong ONVIF conformance makes this a likely good fit; not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically.
